summary: TX Requests Page & Edit Feature Testing Complete. All features verified: 1) Edit button removed from Transactions page - CONFIRMED. 2) TX Requests page rebuilt with expandable card-based forms - CONFIRMED. 3) Payment Currency dropdown with auto-calculation working in both Create and Edit dialogs. 4) PUT endpoint accepts amount, base_currency, base_amount, exchange_rate fields. 5) Filter by status (pending/processed) working. 6) Process button with captcha working.
passed_tests: Transactions page: NO edit/pencil buttons in Actions column - VERIFIED
TX Requests page: Card-based layout renders (8 cards: 5 pending, 3 processed)
TX Requests page: Click card header to expand/collapse - WORKING
TX Requests page: Processed requests show read-only data (no Save/Process buttons)
TX Requests page: New Request button opens create dialog
TX Requests page: Create dialog has Payment Currency dropdown (USD, EUR, GBP, AED, SAR, INR, JPY, USDT)
TX Requests page: Non-USD currency shows exchange rate and base amount with auto-calculation (tested INR: 1000 INR x 0.01 = 10 USD)
TX Requests page: Pending requests show editable card form with Save, Process, Delete buttons
PUT /api/transaction-requests/{id} accepts base_currency, base_amount, exchange_rate fields
PUT /api/transaction-requests/{id} accepts destination_type, client_usdt_address, client_usdt_network fields
PUT endpoint rejects editing processed requests (400 error)
Process dialog shows captcha verification (What is 9 + 6?)
Create and Delete pending requests working
critical_code_review_comments: Transactions.js: Actions column (lines 1561-1567) only contains Eye (view) button - edit button successfully removed
TransactionRequests.js: Well-structured EditableRequestCard component with conditional rendering for pending vs processed
TransactionRequests.js: Payment Currency dropdown with full currency list (USD, EUR, GBP, AED, SAR, INR, JPY, USDT) at line 19
TransactionRequests.js: Auto-calculation logic for non-USD currencies in handleBaseCurrencyChange, handleBaseAmountChange, handleExchangeRateChange
server.py PUT /api/transaction-requests: Allowed fields include amount, base_currency, base_amount, exchange_rate at lines 6691-6695
seed_data_creation: Created test pending requests with various CRM references (TEST-CRM-*, TEST-EDIT-*, TEST-CUR-*, TEST-DEST-*, TEST-DEL-*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: TX Requests page fully rebuilt with card-based forms. Pending cards are editable (Save/Process/Delete), processed cards are read-only. Payment Currency dropdown enables manual currency entry with auto-calculation to USD. Edit button removed from main Transactions page - only View button remains.
